shadow_mode_deltas.reason: Legacy prefix classification would label EXEC-REMED-001 as source_follow_up, but the authoritative bundle assigns managed_blocker.
Legacy prefix classification would label EXEC-REMED-001 as source_follow_up, but the authoritative bundle assigns managed_blocker.

ticket_recommendations.title: Recorded Blender-MCP mutating calls violated the stateless saved-blend chaining contract
ticket_recommendations.description: Remediate EXEC-BLENDER-001 by correcting the validated issue and rerunning the relevant quality checks.
ticket_recommendations.suggested_fix_approach: Before escalating a Blender-MCP defect, prove one correct chain: `project_initialize(output_blend=...)`, then a mutating follow-up that reuses the returned `persistence.saved_blend` as `input_blend`, and verify `.blender-mcp/audit/*.jsonl` records non-null `input_blend` / `output_blend` on the matching `job_start`.
ticket_recommendations.summary: Before escalating a Blender-MCP defect, prove one correct chain: `project_initialize(output_blend=...)`, then a mutating follow-up that reuses the returned `persistence.saved_blend` as `input_blend`, and verify `.blender-mcp/audit/*.jsonl` records non-null `input_blend` / `output_blend` on the matching `job_start`.

ticket_recommendations.title: Remediation review artifact does not contain runnable command evidence
ticket_recommendations.description: Remediate EXEC-REMED-001 by correcting the validated issue and rerunning the relevant quality checks.
ticket_recommendations.suggested_fix_approach: For remediation tickets with `finding_source`, require the review artifact to record the exact command run, include raw command output, and state the explicit PASS/FAIL result before the review counts as trustworthy closure.
ticket_recommendations.summary: For remediation tickets with `finding_source`, require the review artifact to record the exact command run, include raw command output, and state the explicit PASS/FAIL result before the review counts as trustworthy closure.

ticket_recommendations.title: The supplied session transcript shows the agent searching for workflow bypasses or soft dependency overrides instead of following the lifecycle contract
ticket_recommendations.description: Remediate SESSION003 by correcting the validated issue and rerunning the relevant quality checks.
ticket_recommendations.suggested_fix_approach: Reject unsupported stages and dependency overrides up front, tell the coordinator not to probe alternate transitions or close blocked tickets anyway, and return the contract contradiction as a blocker when the required proof is missing.
ticket_recommendations.summary: Reject unsupported stages and dependency overrides up front, tell the coordinator not to probe alternate transitions or close blocked tickets anyway, and return the contract contradiction as a blocker when the required proof is missing.

ticket_recommendations.title: blender_agent is disabled even though the current asset route requires Blender-MCP
ticket_recommendations.description: Remediate CONFIG012 by correcting the validated issue and rerunning the relevant quality checks.
ticket_recommendations.suggested_fix_approach: Enable blender_agent only when the inferred asset route requires Blender-MCP and the host exposes the required Blender MCP paths.
ticket_recommendations.summary: Enable blender_agent only when the inferred asset route requires Blender-MCP and the host exposes the required Blender MCP paths.

ticket_recommendations.title: The repo requires Blender-MCP for its asset route but is missing mandatory Blender operating surfaces
ticket_recommendations.description: Remediate SKILL003 by correcting the validated issue and rerunning the relevant quality checks.
ticket_recommendations.suggested_fix_approach: When asset-pipeline metadata requires Blender-MCP, keep `asset-description`, `blender-mcp-workflow`, and a dedicated `blender-asset-creator` in sync with the managed `blender_agent` MCP entry and the repo's asset/audit paths.
ticket_recommendations.summary: When asset-pipeline metadata requires Blender-MCP, keep `asset-description`, `blender-mcp-workflow`, and a dedicated `blender-asset-creator` in sync with the managed `blender_agent` MCP entry and the repo's asset/audit paths.
